summary: This document is an EU Declaration of Conformity certifying KeepMeCompany's AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform as a Class I medical device under MDR 2017/745. It details the regulatory justification for the classification, lists applicable technical standards, and includes signature details from the CEO and regulatory contacts. The document confirms the software functions solely as a communication tool without diagnostic decision-making capabilities.
